info.name: Ankuaru Auction Backend - GraphQL
info.description: GraphQL Postman collection for Ankuaru Auction backend. All requests use POST /graphql.

exec: const token = data && data.data && data.data.login && data.data.login.token;
const userId = data && data.data && data.data.login && data.data.login.user && data.data.login.user.id;
const auction = data && data.data && data.data.createAuction && data.data.createAuction.auction;

body.raw:
{
  "query": "mutation CreateAuction($input: CreateAuctionInput!) { createAuction(input: $input) }",
  "variables": {
    "input": {
      "title": "Postman Grains Auction",
      "auctionCategory": "Grains and Cereals",
      "productName": "Teff",
      "commodityType": "white",
      "grade": "1",
      "quantity": "1000",
      "quantityUnit": "KG",
      "itemDescription": "Teff sample from Postman",
      "reservePrice": "1000",
      "minBid": "100",
      "auctionType": "SELL",
      "visibility": "PUBLIC",
      "startAt": "2026-03-10T09:00:00.000Z",
      "endAt": "2026-03-10T10:00:00.000Z"
    }
  }
}

formdata.value: {"query":"mutation CreateAuction($input: CreateAuctionInput!) { createAuction(input: $input) }","variables":{"input":{"title":"Postman FormData Auction","auctionCategory":"Grains and Cereals","productName":"Teff","commodityType":"white","grade":"1","quantity":"1000","quantityUnit":"KG","itemDescription":"Form-data create auction sample","reservePrice":"1000","minBid":"100","auctionType":"SELL","visibility":"PUBLIC","startAt":"2026-03-10T09:00:00.000Z","endAt":"2026-03-10T10:00:00.000Z","auctionImageUrl":null}}}
